The officers mentioned below were earlier posted at Column No. 5 Ad-hoc to the post of Under-Secretary as on the date mentioned herein
was promoted. Now regular of the year 2022-23 for promotion to the post of Under Secretary
Since the officer qualifies on the selection list, their ad-hoc promotions are being regularised.
Column No. The dates of regular promotion to the post of Under Secretary are being given as mentioned in section 6.

para_trans: (2) The option of the aforesaid officers with respect to their fixation of pay shall, with effect from the date of this order, be
Give it within a month. If such an option is not provided, their salary is fixed as Maharashtra Civil Service (Salary).
As per Rule 11 (1) of the Rules 1981, the date of promotion shall be taken into account.
3. The date of regular promotion to the post of Under Secretary given to the above-mentioned officers.
